body:
### Problem

`NVIM v0.11.6`, possibly related to the https://github.com/neovim/neovim/issues/37091:

```
Error in decoration provider "line" (ns=nvim.treesitter.highlighter):                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        
Error executing lua: /opt/nvim/share/nvim/runtime/lua/vim/treesitter.lua:195: Index out of bounds                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            
stack traceback:                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             
        [C]: in function 'nvim_buf_get_text'                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 
        /opt/nvim/share/nvim/runtime/lua/vim/treesitter.lua:195: in function 'get_node_text'                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 
        /opt/nvim/share/nvim/runtime/lua/vim/treesitter/query.lua:553: in function 'handler'                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 
        /opt/nvim/share/nvim/runtime/lua/vim/treesitter/query.lua:884: in function '_match_predicates'                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       
        /opt/nvim/share/nvim/runtime/lua/vim/treesitter/query.lua:1013: in function 'iter'                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   
        ...im/share/nvim/runtime/lua/vim/treesitter/highlighter.lua:385: in function 'fn'                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    
        ...im/share/nvim/runtime/lua/vim/treesitter/highlighter.lua:239: in function 'for_each_highlight_state'                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
        ...im/share/nvim/runtime/lua/vim/treesitter/highlighter.lua:358: in function 'on_line_impl'                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          
        ...im/share/nvim/runtime/lua/vim/treesitter/highlighter.lua:457: in function <...im/share/nvim/runtime/lua/vim/treesitter/highlighter.lua:451>                                                                                                                                                                                                       
Error in decoration provider "line" (ns=nvim.treesitter.highlighter):                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        
Error executing lua: /opt/nvim/share/nvim/runtime/lua/vim/treesitter.lua:195: Index out of bounds                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            
stack traceback:                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             
        [C]: in function 'nvim_buf_get_text'                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 
        /opt/nvim/share/nvim/runtime/lua/vim/treesitter.lua:195: in function 'get_node_text'                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 
        /opt/nvim/share/nvim/runtime/lua/vim/treesitter/query.lua:553: in function 'handler'                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 
        /opt/nvim/share/nvim/runtime/lua/vim/treesitter/query.lua:884: in function '_match_predicates'                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       
        /opt/nvim/share/nvim/runtime/lua/vim/treesitter/query.lua:1013: in function 'iter'                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   
        ...im/share/nvim/runtime/lua/vim/treesitter/highlighter.lua:385: in function 'fn'                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    
        ...im/share/nvim/runtime/lua/vim/treesitter/highlighter.lua:239: in function 'for_each_highlight_state'                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
        ...im/share/nvim/runtime/lua/vim/treesitter/highlighter.lua:358: in function 'on_line_impl'                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          
        ...im/share/nvim/runtime/lua/vim/treesitter/highlighter.lua:457: in function <...im/share/nvim/runtime/lua/vim/treesitter/highlighter.lua:451>                                                                                                                                                                                                       
        [C]: in function 'nvim_                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
```



### Steps to reproduce

Repro is elusive, but this mostly happens when rapidly changing state of the buffer with TS enabled. Think `3kdvip` typed rapidly.

### Expected behavior

Boundary checks are performed and/or errors message is silenced if former is detrimental to performance.

### Nvim version (nvim -v)

0.11.6

### Vim (not Nvim) behaves the same?

no

### Operating system/version

Debian Linux 13

### Terminal name/version

foot

### $TERM environment variable

foot-direct

### Installation

GitHub release binary

comment_data.body: Please test the latest nightly (Nvim 0.12). There's been a number of treesitter fixes since Nvim 0.11. If you can reproduce it, we do need a minimal example we can use to reproduce this ourselves.

> Boundary checks are performed and/or errors message is silenced if former is detrimental to performance.

Yes,  `for_each_highlight_state` may be related to https://github.com/neovim/neovim/commit/098da1fc2c9ba65adb9c2f7ecb76b26f6e6b0383 @ribru17

labels.description: We need minimal steps to reproduce the issue
labels.name: needs:repro

title: Treesitter highlighter, out of bounds checks
